title: Andy Jassy says Amazon investors will be rewarded by all its AI spending
summary: CEO Andy Jassy emphasized that Amazon's massive AI investments represent a once-in-a-generation opportunity for the company. He argued that this spending will ultimately deliver substantial returns to shareholders. Jassy's comments signal confidence in AI's long-term value creation despite near-term financial pressure.
content: CEO Andy Jassy said Amazon’s massive AI spending reflects a once-in-a-generation opportunity and will ultimately reward investors.

zh.title: 安迪·贾西表示亚马逊投资者将因所有AI支出而获得回报
zh.summary: 首席执行官安迪·贾西强调，亚马逊的大规模AI投资代表了公司千载难逢的机会。他辩称，这笔支出最终将为股东带来实质性回报。贾西的言论表明，尽管面临短期财务压力，但他对AI长期价值创造充满信心。

title: Oil slides as traders assess Middle East developments with Iran attacks keeping markets jittery
summary: Oil prices declined Tuesday as traders reassessed the impact of recent Middle East tensions and Iran-related developments on global energy markets. The pullback reversed sharp gains from the previous session as uncertainty over the geopolitical situation persists. Investors remain cautious about future energy supply disruptions.
content: Oil prices declined on Tuesday, retreating from sharp gains in the previous session.

zh.title: 交易员评估中东局势，伊朗攻击令市场紧张之际石油下滑
zh.summary: 周二油价下跌，交易员重新评估最近中东紧张局势和伊朗相关事态对全球能源市场的影响。随着地缘政治局势的不确定性持续存在，跌幅逆转了前一交易日的大幅上涨。投资者对未来能源供应中断仍保持谨慎态度。

title: Palantir posts its fastest revenue growth ever while calling out ‘AI slop’
summary: Palantir reported earnings that exceeded expectations, posting record revenue growth fueled by explosive demand in its core U.S. market. The company also criticized what it calls "AI slop"—low-quality, mass-produced AI implementations—reflecting tensions within the broader AI industry. Palantir's expansion underscores strong enterprise adoption of its data analytics platform.
content: Palantir earnings beat expectations on the heels of explosive demand in the company’s core U.S. market.

zh.title: Palantir创造有史以来最快的收入增长，同时批评"AI垃圾"
zh.summary: Palantir报告的收益超出预期，创造了创纪录的收入增长，由其核心美国市场的爆炸性需求推动。公司还批评了它所称的"AI垃圾"——低质量、大批量生产的AI实现——反映了更广泛AI行业内的紧张关系。Palantir的扩展强调了其数据分析平台的强大企业采用。
